      "text": "Gevoxo mums Paligu
Behdu Laikā/ jo Zilweku Pesti-
fehana irr neleetiga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ar Deewa darrifim mehs
fitprus Darbus/ tas pats muh-
fu Prettimeekus faspaṙdihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta CIX. Dseesma.
Irr weena gauscha Euhdsechana muhfa Kun-
ga Kristus/ prett jawu Modeweju Juheu
un teem Judeem : 1/ a. Kuxreem winsch
arridsan wisfadas Sohdibas beedina : 6.
Un luhfs ka Deews winnam schehligi grib:
betu palihdseht : 21. Par ko winsch arri,
dsan Pateizibu apfohla : 30.
Weena Dahwida Dseefma preeksch
ta augsta Dseedataja.
1. W R Deews mannas
Teiktchanas! ne zeet
klussu.
2. Jo ta Besdeewign Mut-
te/ unn ta Wiltneeka Mutte irr
orett mann atwehrufschees/ tee
cunna ar mannim ar wittign
Mehli.
3. Ar naidigeem Wahrdeem
mettahs tee apkahrt manni/ un
caujahs ar man bes Wainas.
4. Par to/ ka es tohs mihle-
u/ turrahs tee mann pretti/ bet
s luhdsu Decwu.
5. Tee makfa man Launu
var Labbu/ un Eenaidibu par
Mihlestibu.
6. Eezell weenu Besdeewign
ahr to/ un tas Satans lai win-
cam stahw pa labbo Rohku.
7. Kad winsch tohp teefahts/
ad lai winsch tohp par Besdee-
vigu nospreests/ un winna Dee-
va Luhgsehana lai winnam par
Brehkeem tohp.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lai winna Deenas Masu-
mā eet/ un winna Amattu lai
zits dabbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winna Behrni buhs par
Bahriteem/ un winna Seewa
par Atraitni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lai winna Behrni ka
Tekkuti apkahrt straida/ un dee-
dełe/ un (Maist) mekle no ta-
wahm tspohstitahm Weetahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lai tas Parrada-Dsinnejs
isplehfsch winsu/ kas tam peederr/
un Swefschi lai winna Darbu
aplauipa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lai winnam ne weens pa-
leek/ kas tam Schehlastibu pa-
rahda/ ir ne weens/ kas pahr
winna Bahriteem apschehlo-
jahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lai winna Pehznahka-
mee tohp tsdeldeti / ka winna
Wahrds ohtrā Auguma isnihzi-
nahts tohp.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winna Tehwu Nosee-
gums lai tohp peeminnehts
preeksch ta KUNGA/ un winna
Mahtes Grehki lai ne tohp is-
deldeti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka tee weenumehr ta
KUNGA Preekcha paleek/ un
winna Peeminneschana lai no
Semmes tsdeldeta tohp.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht/ ka winsch wis-
fai ne atgahdajahs Schehlastibu
darriht/ bet wajaja to Behdigu
un Nabbagu/ un to/ kam no-
skummust Strds bija/ ka winsch
to nokanta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz ka winsch to Lah-
ftu gribbeja/ tad ir ta winnam
Ecccccc 3
